narrative:
Precinct Mill Township (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 1,343 registered voters, with 59.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 16.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.3%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.6 percentage points.
